title: FOI2025-00215: ChatGPT history for ministers in DSIT
body: "   Reference number FOI2025-00215   Date of request 14 March 2025   Date of response 10 April 2025   Outcome Information withheld     The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (the department) received the following request for information which we responded to under the Freedom of Information Act 2000 (FOIA):    I would like to request the prompts to and answers from ChatGPT and other generative AI systems made by these ministers in their official capacity (not personal) Feryal Clark, Lord Vallance, Chis Bryant, Baroness Jones.    "
